name: auto-agent-protocol
description: MCP wrapper exposing AAP automotive skills as MCP tools. Each tool corresponds to one AAP v1.0 skill and accepts/returns the matching AAP request/response payload.

tools.name: aap_dealer_information
tools.description: Return the dealership profile (group name, welcome message, and rooftops with address, hours, contacts, and capabilities). Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_facets
tools.description: Return aggregated facets (makes, models, years, conditions, price/mileage ranges) over the dealer's inventory. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_search
tools.description: Search the dealer's inventory by make, model, year, condition, price, mileage, body, fuel, drivetrain, VIN, stock, or free-text query. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_inventory_vehicle
tools.description: Return full detail for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock, or vehicle_id, including FTC-compliant pricing fields and (optionally) regional offered_price for a given ZIP. Anonymous-safe; no consent required.

tools.name: aap_lead_submit
tools.description: Submit a consented lead carrying customer info plus any combination of vehicle_of_interest, trade_in, and appointment. ConsentGrant with scope ['lead_submission'] is REQUIRED.
